  "findings": [
    "Breaker is secured with tape instead of a physical lockout device.",
    "No verification step (try step) is performed to ensure zero energy state.",
    "Stored mechanical energy in the raised conveyor section is not controlled or blocked."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop all work immediately.",
    "Apply an approved lockout device and padlock to the disconnecting breaker.",
    "Verify isolation by attempting to start the conveyor (try step) and testing for zero electrical energy.",
    "Physically block or pin the raised conveyor section to dissipate and control stored mechanical energy."
  ],
  "rationale": "The current lockout/tagout procedure violates basic safety standards by using tape instead of a lock, failing to verify isolation, and ignoring stored mechanical energy, posing an immediate life-safety hazard.",

    "OSHA 1910.147(c)(4)",

  ]
